title: Custom Level Colour
description: Simple mod that allows you to customize the colour of your experience level.
body:
Allows customizing the colour of the text displayed above the XP bar. Supports changing both the outline colour and the actual text colour.

![The experience bar, showing the player is at level 30. The text colour has been changed to red and the colour of the outline around the text has been changed to blue.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hqlyQAoc/images/976faba3d11848bf1e6b1ba46de68aceadea9e2a.png)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required in order to open the config screen.

## Support

If you find any bugs, please file them on [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/inyourwalls/CustomLevelColour/issues).
